title: Local Variable Type Inference and Inheritance in Java
description: A flowchart demonstrating how `var` interacts with inheritance and method overloading, showing compile-time type inference and runtime polymorphism.
relationships: var infers the static type at compile-time based on the initializer
Method resolution depends on the inferred static type
Runtime polymorphism (overridden methods) uses the actual object's type
Overloaded method choice is made at compile-time based on the static type
